017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
021
022/**
023 * Handler for a single MCP resource.
024 *
025 * <p>
026 * Implementations declare a {@link #descriptor() descriptor} (the {@link Resource} returned by {@code resources/list})
027 * and a {@link #read(String, BeanStore) read} body invoked when the matching {@code resources/read} method runs.
028 */
029@FunctionalInterface
030public interface McpResourceHandler {
031
032   /**
033    * Returns the static descriptor for this resource.
034    *
035    * <p>
036    * The {@link Resource#getUri() uri} value is used by {@link McpDispatcher} to route incoming
037    * {@code resources/read} requests, so each handler in an {@link McpServerConfig} must use a unique URI.
038    *
039    * @return The resource descriptor. Never {@code null}.
040    */
041   default Resource descriptor() {
042      throw new UnsupportedOperationException("descriptor() must be implemented by McpResourceHandler subclasses.");
043   }
044
045   /**
046    * Reads the resource body.
047    *
048    * @param uri The URI from the {@code resources/read} request (matches {@link #descriptor()}.{@code uri}).
049    * @param ctx Per-request bean store. Never {@code null}.
050    * @return The resource contents. Never {@code null}.
051    */
052   ReadResourceResult read(String uri, BeanStore ctx);
053}
